name: HCI Group, Inc.
summary: HCI Group, Inc. is an insurance holding company primarily engaged in property and casualty insurance. The company offers homeowners insurance and related products. It operates with a focus on managing risk through reinsurance arrangements and is subject to state insurance regulations. HCI is listed on a stock exchange under the ticker HCI and files with the SEC under CIK 0001400810.
